text: The repetition of the phrase, "I'm not a professional. I'm just a walker," reverberates in my mind as I pass through these bright, glassy interiors into a curated space full of innovation and research. It is humbling. I feel a subtle sense of freedom—liberated from expectation—and an awareness of my own presence, simply absorbing the knowledge and creativity around me, unconcerned by titles or expertise. I am allowed to simply be, and to wander.
